creator: steve@sohara.org
text:
Hi,

	I wasn't aware of multimedia/exportvideo, but I would think that
since mencoder has support for nuppelvideo this is as obsolete as
nuppelvideo. Nuppelvideo is slated for removal because it is unmaintained
upstream (for a long time now) and does not compile with modern compilers.

On Sat, 24 Nov 2007 11:40:10 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of multimedia/nuppelvideo,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/118232 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/118232
>
